snippet.title: Clayface | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Meet the new face of Gotham. #ClayfaceMovie only in theaters October 23.

DC Studios’ “Clayface” is a horror thriller from director James Watkins, starring Tom Rhys Harries in the title role of the cult favorite villain from Gotham’s rogues gallery.

Matt Hagen’s meteoric rise from Gotham street kid to Hollywood leading man is tragically cut short when a local crime boss’s actions leave him horribly disfigured. Abandoned by his team and with nothing left, Matt seeks out a cutting edge treatment that miraculously returns him to his former self… but also unexpectedly affects his grip on reality, spiraling him down a destructive path of all-consuming revenge.

The film also stars Naomi Ackie, David Dencik, Max Minghella and Eddie Marsan, as well as Nancy Carroll and Joshua James.

James Watkins directs from a screenplay by Mike Flanagan and Hossein Amini, story by Flanagan, based on characters from DC. The film is produced by Matt Reeves, Lynn Harris, James Gunn and Peter Safran, with Michael E. Uslan, Chantal Nong Vo, Lars P. Winther, Rafi Crohn and Paul Ritchie executive producing.

Watkins’ creative team includes director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer James Price, editor Jon Harris and costume designer Keith Madden. Music is by Volker Bertelmann.

DC Studios Presents a 6th & Idaho Production, a James Watkins Film, “Clayface.” The film will be distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures and released only in theaters in North America on October 23, 2026, and internationally beginning 21 October 2026.

snippet.description:
Today me and caylus had to draw or else we got eaten. Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens.

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community.  Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

About Sophie Lloyd:

Welcome to my official Sophie Lloyd YouTube channel! 

I've been playing guitar since I was 9 years old, and this channel has been at the heart of everything I've done. What started with me uploading guitar videos from my bedroom has grown into a career I could never have imagined.

Here you'll find original music, guitar shred covers, riffs, solos, behind-the-scenes videos, gear, and whatever else I'm working on. Whether you're here to learn something, discover new music, or just watch me make a lot of noise with a guitar, I'm really glad you're here.

Over the years, this channel has opened so many incredible doors. I've had the chance to tour the world as guitarist for MGK performing at iconic venues like Madison Square Garden and London O2, as well as festivals including Lollapalooza, Hellfest, Rock am Ring, and Download with my own solo band. I've released my debut album Imposter Syndrome, become the first female artist with a signature Kiesel guitar, created my own guitar course with TrueFire, and worked with some amazing artists including AvrilLavigne , halsey , JellyRoll , yungblud , Oli Sykes, wizkhalifa , travisbarker  and many more.

None of this would have been possible without the incredible community that's grown around this channel. Whether you've been here since my first covers or you've only just found my videos, thank you for being part of the journey.

Thanks so much for watching and supporting what I do. You guys are awesome!

I endorse:

KIESEL GUITARS
ERNIE BALL

#SophieLloyd #RockMusic #BlackSabbath #Guitar #ShredVersion #Paranoid #Ozzy

snippet.title: Other Mommy | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Your mommy won’t save you. Other Mommy only in theaters October 9.

Can I go inside your heart?

From James Wan, one of the most influential architects of modern horror behind the Saw, Insidious and The Conjuring franchises—and Rob Savage, the director of bold genre films Host and The Boogeyman, comes a terrifying trip into the darkening world of a young girl, Bela, who forms a relationship with a sinister entity in her home who looks uncannily like her own mother.

Academy Award® winner Jessica Chastain (It Chapter Two, The Eyes of Tammy Faye) stars in a dual role as Bela’s mother and as “Other Mommy,” a manifestation of the entity. Jay Duplass (Transparent, Industry) plays Daddo, Bela’s father, and Arabella Olivia Clark (The Housemaid, The Hand that Rocks the Cradle) plays Bela. 

The impressive supporting cast includes Actor Award nominee Dichen Lachman (Severance), Emmy and Tony Award nominee Arian Moayed (Succession) and screen legend Karen Allen (Indiana Jones films).  

From Blumhouse Atomic Monster, Other Mommy is directed by Rob Savage from a screenplay by WGA award winner Nathan Elston, writer for the Emmy-winning sensation Succession, based on the New York Times bestselling novel Incidents Around the House by Josh Malerman (Bird Box).

The film is produced by James Wan, p.g.a., and is executive produced by Michael Clear, Judson Scott, Rob Savage, Josh Malerman and Ryan Lewis. 

Social Handles

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/othermommy/

snippet.title: CLAYFACE TRAILER REACTION - DC IS GOING FULL ON BODY HORROR!
snippet.description:
HOLY HELL, DC IS ACTUALLY GOING THERE!! Greg Alba & Coy Jandreau react to the brand-new CLAYFACE Official Trailer from DC Studios, released during SDCC 2026 week! Fresh off the massive Avengers: Doomsday trailer, San Diego Comic-Con continues with our first full look at this R-rated DCU body-horror movie set in Gotham City.
In our Clayface trailer reaction, breakdown, and review, we discuss Tom Rhys Harries as struggling actor Matt Hagen, his horrifying transformation into the classic Batman villain, Naomi Ackie as Dr. Caitlyn Corr, Max Minghella as Gotham detective John Pearlman, and director James Watkins fully embracing the grotesque horror of movies like The Fly and The Substance. The practical effects, melting faces, scissors scene, nanotechnology serum, psychological horror, and tragic character story all make this feel completely different from anything Marvel or DC has attempted before.
We also talk about James Gunn and Peter Safran’s DC Universe, Mike Flanagan’s original Clayface script, this movie’s place in the DCU, the absence of Batman, potential connections to the Caped Crusader, Matt Reeves’ The Batman Part II, Robert Pattinson’s Batman universe, DC Studios at San Diego Comic-Con, and whether Clayface could become one of the most disturbing comic-book movies ever made.

#Clayface #DCU #Batman #DCStudios #SDCC #SanDiegoComicCon #TheBatman2 #JamesGunn #trailerreaction

snippet.description:
Go behind the scenes of DC Studios' ‘Clayface’ as star Tom Rhys Harries and Director James Watkins break down the official trailer. The pair reveal how they brought one of Batman’s most tragic villains to life, exploring the emotional transformation behind the body horror, the practical prosthetics that shaped Tom’s performance, and the detailed worldbuilding that makes the streets of Gotham feel real.

They also unpack some of the trailer's key moments, from the skin-crawling scissors sequence to the significance of Matt's time in the bath as his identity begins to slip away. Together, Harries and Watkins reveal how Matt's pursuit of justice gives way to the primal instincts that slowly consume him.
